title: batch request

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

items.description: Structured requests configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

requests.description: Ordered requests entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

description: Execute multiple xdebug requests as one ordered batch.
x-purpose: 批量执行多个 xdebug request。
x-how_it_works: 按 requests 顺序复用同一入口逐条调度，汇总每条响应。
x-when_to_use: 减少多轮 IPC 和保持一组查询的上下文一致。
x-description-zh: 批量执行多个 xdebug request。

use_when: 需要按顺序执行多个相互独立的 native xdebug request。
do_not_use_when: 需要一个 MCP session 中的单个 action 查询或跨请求共享结果。

alternatives.when: 需要先验证单个 request 合同。
